overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a fantasy stone cottage at night. The camera slowly pans up the exterior of the warmly lit building surrounded by flowering trees, then transitions to the cozy wooden interior with a fireplace and rustic furnishings.

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the exterior of a fantasy stone cottage at night, slowly tilting upward from the ground floor past lit windows and a wall-mounted lantern to reveal the towering roof structure and attic window against a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy cottage interior with fireplace and bar

medieval-style chandelier hanging from beamed ceiling
large fur rugs spread across the wooden floor

dark wood paneled walls with decorative plates

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the warm interior of the cottage, revealing a rustic main hall with a burning fireplace, wooden staircase, chandelier, and a bar counter. The camera moves slightly to showcase the cozy, dimly lit atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the moonlit exterior of a fantasy stone cottage into its warm, rustic interior. It begins at the ground level, tilting slowly upward past glowing windows and a wall-mounted lantern to reveal the towering roof and an attic window set against a starry night sky. As the perspective shifts inward, the cool night air gives way to the golden glow of a cozy main hall. The scene then expands to showcase a burning fireplace, a wooden staircase, and a chandelier hanging above a bar counter, with the camera gliding slightly to emphasize the dimly lit, inviting atmosphere.
